chunks.title: Abimelech Becomes King
chunks.reason: Narrative of Abimelech's rise to power through his mother's relatives and the killing of his brothers.

chunks.title: Jotham's Parable and Curse
chunks.reason: Jotham delivers a parable of the trees followed by a prophetic curse on Shechem and Abimelech.

chunks.title: God's Judgment Begins
chunks.reason: Narrative describing God sending an evil spirit to cause conflict between Abimelech and the Shechemites.

chunks.title: Gaal vs. Zebul
chunks.reason: Dialogue and confrontation between Gaal and the city ruler Zebul regarding Abimelech's rule.

chunks.title: Siege of Shechem
chunks.reason: Narrative of Abimelech's military campaign to capture and destroy the city of Shechem.

chunks.title: The Tower of Shechem
chunks.reason: Narrative of the lords of the tower seeking refuge and their subsequent destruction by fire.

chunks.title: Death of Abimelech
chunks.reason: Narrative of the siege of Thebez and Abimelech's death by a millstone.

chunks.title: Conclusion of the Story
chunks.reason: Narrative conclusion summarizing God's judgment on Abimelech and the men of Shechem.
